calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for the Petitioner.

Mr. Weinkauf stated that Mr. Accornero waived notice and that Probate Code 1204 stated that any person may waive notice by any writing signed by the person or their Attorney. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-09-2009 Continued To Sep-23-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Continued To Sep-09-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Those Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Giulio Accornero for the Petitioner. Steven Weinkauff for the Administrator>

Mr. Acconero stated that the only evidence he had to show that David Brown and Amanda Brown Dodd were children of Reynold Brown was a statement from the Sister. Mr. Weinkauf stated that he had no issue with standing. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR#7077. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aquino.

Petition To Determine Those Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-28-2009 Continued To May-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Those Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-03-2009 Continued To Apr-28-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Giulio Accornero for Natalie Brown.

Mr. Accornero stated that he has been unable to serve Lorraine Brown Allen, that it may not be necessary, but he is still waiting for Ms. Bozeman to file a statement of interest which may show Ms. Brown Allen is a step-daughter. The Court stated that there had been less then desired contact between counsel and the Examiner in this estate. Mr. Accornero stated that he has left messages for the Examiner. The Court stated that if the Examiner attempts to contact an attorney it is requesting that the attorney contact the Examiner. In addition, the Court requested Mr. Accornero contact the Examiner with a follow-up regarding Ms. Bozeman. The matter was continued to April 28, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy S. Neu.
